shortDescription: "() are optional for method calls without arguments"
shortCorrection: "() are mandatory even for method calls without arguments"

  - citationKey: hristovaIdentifyingCorrectingJava2003

    name: "Forgetting parentheses after a method call"

When calling a method or constructor without arguments, it is not necessary to use parentheses.

frontmatter.shortDescription: () are optional for method calls without arguments
frontmatter.shortCorrection: () are mandatory even for method calls without arguments
